member.name: M:GTA.World.CreateParticleEffect(GTA.ParticleEffectAsset,System.String,GTA.Entity,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.InvertAxisFlags)

on an
that runs looped.

The
the effect is attached to.

to attach the effect.

, the effect has.
How much to scale the size of the effect by.
Which axis to flip the effect in. For a car side exhaust you may need to flip in the Y Axis.
